company_info.description: Northsand, Inc. provides IT consulting, business consulting, and new business launch services for companies in Japan. The company's services include IT consulting, business consulting, digital consulting, project management, and in-house services. The company's business consulting services include marketing, sales, human resources, business improvement, strategy formulation, and implementation support. It uses digital marketing, data platform construction, and machine learning to provides digital consulting services. Additionally, it provides IT consulting services including IT strategy and corporate areas, implementation and operations areas, including formulating mid-term IT plans, examining architecture design, and reducing IT operating costs. It also offers support for project management, operation, and execution. Additionally, it provides in-house services for a wide range of fields through agency and license agreements. The company uses digital technologies, such as IoT, AI, Fintech, and big data, legacy technologies for digital strategy planning. It also offers comprehensive training and development programs. Additionally, it provides Notion, a centralized information management tool. The company provides consulting services across a wide range of industries and sectors including self-service beer servers and fitness, finance, manufacturing, human resources, and communications. Northsand, Inc. was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Chuo, Tokyo, Japan.
